tagline: A simple field guide to some of the birds of the Western Ghats.
about_html:
Birds of the Sahyadris

Birds of the Sahyadris is a small project focused on the birds of the Western Ghats. It aims to give clear, practical descriptions for identification, along with notes on habitat, behaviour and conservation.

This is a work in progress and will grow over time as new species, photographs and notes are added.

contact.note_html: If you have questions, corrections, or would like to contribute photographs taken in the Sahyadris, you can get in touch using the form below.
